Title: Price of Business
Description:
Not sure if you’d had the pleasure of dealing with the Rough & Ready, but the gang is laser focused on cornering the fuel market in Pyro. Smart play, but one we can’t let happen without them providing us some concessions. Since they’re currently not interested in negotiating, we’re forced to show them what happens to those who oppose us.

We’ve identified ~mission(Pickup1|Address) as a prime target for such an attack. We also know they recently received some supplies that should be a fitting price for their obstinance. Once inside the station, do whatever you need to do to confiscate the ~mission(item). We’ll send payment once you’ve delivered them to ~mission(Dropoff1|Address).      

Comm. Spec. Engler

Comm. Spec. Engler

Itinerary:
DELIVERY ITINERARY

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package #[item1|serialnumber] from [Pickup1|Address]
     · Package #[item2|serialnumber] from [Pickup2|Address]
     · Package #[item3|serialnumber] from [Pickup3|Address]

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver ALL packages to [Dropoff1|Address]
